story_title: Runtime File Loading and Brand Mapping

requirements.description: Runtime loads workflow, step, agent, and method-library files through an approved file provider; missing or malformed files fail closed with clear operational errors.

tests.name: loads approved BMAD runtime files as typed descriptors with stable hashes
fails closed when a relative path escapes approved roots
fails closed when CSV listing roots normalize outside approved roots
fails closed when an approved path resolves through a symlink outside approved roots
returns stable operational errors for missing, unsupported, and empty files
does not expose raw filesystem causes on operational errors
rejects malformed method-library CSV files before assembling partial guidance

heuristics.endpoint_coverage: N/A - no API endpoint in Story 2.4
heuristics.auth_negative_path: N/A - no auth surface in Story 2.4
heuristics.error_path: Covered by missing, unsupported, empty, outside-root, symlink, malformed CSV, and invalid key tests

requirements.description: User-visible BMAD-origin identifiers are mapped to ThinkTank while paths, logs, code references, and diagnostic metadata are preserved.

tests.name: maps BMAD-origin visible labels to ThinkTank terminology
preserves markdown code spans, fenced code blocks, paths, and diagnostic tokens
preserves diagnostic log lines where origin labels are technical evidence
preserves multi-backtick code spans and long fenced code blocks
does not close fenced code blocks when a fence-like line has trailing text
does not close fenced code blocks with four-space-indented fence markers
is idempotent across repeated mapping passes
assembles workflow and method-library content while preserving technical source refs

heuristics.endpoint_coverage: N/A - no API endpoint in Story 2.4
heuristics.auth_negative_path: N/A - no auth surface in Story 2.4
heuristics.error_path: Covered through visible/technical text preservation and prompt assembly assertions

requirements.description: A new supported workflow definition can be discovered through the runtime registry without hardcoding a new business flow.

tests.name: discovers the eight MVP ThinkTank workflows from runtime source assets
discovers a configured workflow fixture without workflow-specific branching
parses YAML workflow definitions through the parser boundary
parses CSV workflow definitions through the parser boundary
discovers runtime catalog rows without code-level workflow overrides
rejects malformed runtime manifest headers and rows
rejects malformed workflow frontmatter and YAML definitions
deduplicates equivalent source paths after file-provider canonicalization
registers and exports runtime services from the existing AdvisoryModule
compiles the runtime provider graph and resolves each runtime service

heuristics.endpoint_coverage: N/A - no API endpoint in Story 2.4
heuristics.auth_negative_path: N/A - no auth surface in Story 2.4
heuristics.error_path: Covered by malformed manifest, malformed workflow, duplicate key, unknown key, and invalid key tests

recommendations.action: No blocking coverage gaps. Re-run focused runtime Jest and TypeScript validation when Story 2.5 wires runtime launch behavior.

focused_runtime.command: cd backend && npm run test -- src/modules/advisory/runtime --runInBand

advisory_regression.command: cd backend && npm run test -- src/modules/advisory --runInBand
